title: Life And Death. A Quatrain.
content:
Of our own selves God makes a glass, wherein
 Two shadows image them as might a breath:
 And one is Life, whose other name is Sin;
 And one is Love, whose other name is Death.
meaning:
"Life And Death. A Quatrain." is a quintessential example of Madison Julius Cawein's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
